final:
module RefModule (
    input [2:0] in,
    output reg [2:0] out,
    input clk,
    input rst
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            out <= 3'b000; // Reset output
        end else begin
            out <= 3'b000; // Output is always 0 when dividing by 8
        end
    end
endmodule
